behaviors.description: Valid JSON payloads containing markdown-heavy strings parse successfully and proceed through normal hook input handling.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit can prove JSON parser accepts strings with code fences/backticks/$vars; Integration proves parsed payload is handed off through normal hook-input handling without being misclassified as malformed. Lower-level miss: Unit would not catch parser->handler handoff bugs. Rejected System because behavior text is about valid payload handling, not real stdin/subprocess/OS effects. No AI dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Wire parser + hook-input handler in-process. Feed valid JSON where string fields include markdown fences, inline backticks, and $vars. Assert parse succeeds, no json_parse_failed trace is emitted, and normal handling path is taken.

behaviors.description: Truly malformed JSON payloads produce a `json_parse_failed` trace record with enough context to diagnose the malformed section.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit can verify raw parse failure; Integration verifies parse error is transformed into json_parse_failed trace with diagnostic context fields. Lower-level miss: Unit parser test would miss trace mapping/content loss between modules. Rejected System because behavior does not require real process I/O; malformed bytes can be injected in-process. No AI dependency.
behaviors.test_description: In-process parser + trace emitter test with malformed JSON fixtures (e.g., truncated object, illegal comma). Assert json_parse_failed trace is emitted and includes context locating malformed section (offset/snippet/reason per implementation).

behaviors.description: The local error-policy path maps parse failure to a handled result (no throw) and marks telemetry intent.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit can test policy function return mapping; Integration verifies parser failure object is consumed by error-policy module and telemetry intent is set in resulting outcome. Lower-level miss: Unit alone may miss contract mismatch between parser error shape and policy mapper. Rejected System because behavior explicitly says local error-policy path.
behaviors.test_description: Run parser failure through local error-policy pipeline in-process. Assert no exception escapes, returned result is handled/failure-coded as expected, and telemetry intent flag/field is set.

behaviors.description: In real process execution, malformed stdin does not crash the hook process and still emits the expected trace signal before exit.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Integration can simulate malformed input to entry function; System is required to catch real stdin buffering/process-exit behavior and signal ordering before process termination. Lower-level miss: in-process tests can hide actual crash/exit-code/flush timing failures. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model calls.
behaviors.test_description: Spawn real hook process as subprocess, write malformed stdin, wait for exit. Assert process does not crash unexpectedly (expected handled exit behavior), and expected json_parse_failed trace signal is emitted before termination.

behaviors.description: A real hook invocation path (stdin -> parser -> trace sink) produces the expected trace artifact when malformed input is supplied.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Integration can verify parser->trace sink wiring in-process; System is needed because behavior explicitly requires real invocation path from stdin through process plumbing to actual trace artifact emission. Lower-level miss: in-process fakes may not reproduce stream framing/artifact write timing/location issues. Rejected Agentic/Workflow due no AI stages.
behaviors.test_description: Execute real hook entrypoint with malformed stdin and configured real trace sink target used in runtime. Assert expected trace artifact exists and contains json_parse_failed signal from that invocation.

behaviors.description: Regression tests distinguish malformed-JSON failures from valid-markdown payloads, preventing false attribution to markdown content itself.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit can test parser classification table only; Integration verifies end-to-end local classification + trace behavior across both cohorts (valid markdown-heavy vs malformed JSON) so attribution is correct in handling path. Lower-level miss: Unit may not catch mislabeling introduced in trace/error-mapping layer. Rejected System because distinction logic is content classification, not OS/subprocess behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Parameterized in-process regression suite over two fixture sets: valid markdown-heavy JSON and truly malformed JSON. Assert only malformed set emits json_parse_failed and valid set follows normal path, with explicit assertions preventing markdown-content blame.
